hero.title: Intelligent Chat Data Assistant
hero.subtitle: Access chat data locally, query and analyze conversations through natural language AI chat

features.title: Core Features
features.subtitle: Powerful AI Agent capabilities to help you efficiently query and understand chat data

personality.title: AI Agent Chat
personality.description: Ask questions in natural language — the AI automatically invokes tools to query contacts, chat history, search messages, and more

emotion.title: Multi-Engine Support
emotion.description: Supports LangGraph, Claude Code, Pi-AI and more, with flexible Deep/React Agent mode switching

intent.title: Local Data Security
intent.description: All chat data is stored only on your local device, accessed securely via local decryption or Docker container

multilingual.title: MCP Tool Extensions
multilingual.description: Supports Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to freely extend AI Agent tool capabilities

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to start intelligent chat data queries

step1.title: Install the App
step1.description: Download the installer for your OS from GitHub Releases — supports macOS, Windows, and Linux

step2.title: Configure Data Source
step2.description: Set up your LLM API key and connect chat data via local decryption or Docker

step3.title: Chat & Query
step3.description: Ask the AI questions in natural language to query and analyze your chat history

items.content: Rethink AI lets me quickly find key information in my chat history, greatly improving productivity.
items.author: Michael Zhang

items.content: Data stays completely local, so privacy is guaranteed. The AI query feature is incredibly useful.
items.author: Dr. Lisa Chen

items.content: Switching between Agent modes is flexible — Deep mode for complex analysis, React mode for quick queries.
items.author: David Wang

docs.title: Documentation

pricing.title: Free & Open Source
pricing.subtitle: Rethink AI is completely free and open-source — just configure your own LLM API key

pro.name: LLM API Cost
features: Cost depends on your chosen provider
Use self-hosted open models for free

items.question: Is the app itself free?
items.answer: Yes, Rethink AI is completely free and open-source. You need to provide your own LLM API key — API usage fees are charged by the LLM provider.

items.question: Which chat tools are supported?
items.answer: Currently supports local querying and analysis of chat data.

items.question: How is data security ensured?
items.answer: All chat data is stored only on your local device and is never uploaded to any server. Only your question text is sent to the LLM provider when you actively ask a question.
